   "notes": "AI triage (gemini): Resizing the application window should not cause active remote connections to drop. This indicates a failure in handling UI resize events within the protocol implementations.\nApproach: Ensure that ProtocolBase derived classes (RDP, VNC, Putty) correctly implement ResizeEnd to update their internal controls' dimensions and potentially inform the remote host. Investigate if a missing explicit call to a generic ProtocolBase.Resize() or ProtocolBase.ResizeEnd() is needed within FrmMain.ActivateConnection() or ConnectionTab.FireResizeEnd() for robust handling across all protocols."
 }

 }
